description_long: This is a single, medium-brown chicken egg with a smooth, slightly glossy shell. The surface is mostly uniform in color, with subtle speckling and minor natural imperfections visible upon close inspection. The egg is ovoid, with one end slightly more pointed and the other more rounded, typical of a standard hen's egg. There are faint, natural lines and a few tiny surface blemishes, but no significant cracks or breaks. The shell appears hard and unbroken, enclosing the liquid egg white and yolk inside. The coloration and texture suggest it is fresh and unprocessed, suitable for culinary use or display.
description: A medium-brown, smooth-shelled chicken egg with subtle speckling and a natural, unbroken surface. The egg is ovoid and has a slightly glossy finish.
description_view_0: The egg is seen from the rounded end, showing a smooth, even brown surface with minimal blemishes.
description_view_1: This view reveals a faint surface line and a small blemish near the upper left, with the pointed end slightly more visible.
description_view_2: The egg's side is shown, highlighting a subtle line and a more pronounced curve toward the base.
description_view_3: A nearly symmetrical view of the egg, with the pointed end facing up and a uniform brown color.
attribute_orientation: upright with the pointed end facing up
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered as an ingredient in food preparation or as part of a breakfast setting.
